titleStmt.title: SII 5.410: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 410. (A.R. No. 121 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 3 mel cellāniṉṟa kollam 7 100 3 10 7 varuṣam dunmathi varuṣam Aṟpacimātam 2 10 7 kaparapakṣa ttuc caturtthiyum somavāra mum
dhṛṛtiyoga mum vāyātakara ṇamum peṟṟa tiruvātirai nāḷ kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelveliyil Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyatampirāṉār koyilil patipāta mūlappa
ṭṭuṭaip pañcācāryam teyvakaṉmikaḷukku śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rā mappatevamakārā cayyaṉavarkaḷukkup puṇṇiyamāka śrīmatu viśva nātanāyakkar kṛṛ
ṣṇa ppanāyakkar Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟkum nācciyār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiyanācciyāṟkum tāmraparṇi tirattil cintupūntu
ṟaiyil nām pratiṣṭhi ppitta viśvanāthiśvara ṉukkum viśva nātaṉcantiyāka tiṉantoṟum pūcai naṭantuvarumpaṭikku mātantoṟum miṟukaśirṣa ttu nāḷ tirumañcaṉam pūcaiciṟappu
Utsa vaṅkaḷum naṭantuvarumpaṭikkum varuṣam toṟum Āvaṇi mulattil mahotsa vama naṭantuvarumpaṭikkumāka nām tāmraparṇi tira ttil cintupūntuṟaiyiliruntu
sahiraṇyodakadhārāpūrvvamā ka koṭutta danma māvatu kaṟkkuṭināṭṭu māṉainilai nallūr muṭavukuṟicci Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟukkup perunāṉkelkaiyāvatu kiḻelkai
pālikkoṭṭaikkuḷattil nirnilaikku meṟku teṉelkai periyaparumpukku vaṭakku melelkai paṇṇaipperuvaḻikkum veḷḷaippāṟaikkum
kiḻakku vaṭavelkai ciṟṟāṟṟukkut teṟku Āka Ipperunāṉkelkaikkum Uḷpaṭṭa Ūrkaḷum nāṭṭāṉeriyāṉa periyakuḷamum punakkuḷaṅkaḷum Itukaḷuk
kuḷḷa kṣetra ṅkaḷum nañcai puñcai nattam cettilaikkai karaikkāṭu kāṭutaricu māvaṭai maravaṭai pācivilai kaṟavaikkāṇam Āyantaṟaku cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai Iṭaṅ
kai valaṅkaiyum Inta ssa tussī rmaikkuḷpaṭṭa nidhinikṣepajalapāṣāṇākṣiṇyākāmisiddhasādhya meṉṟu collappaṭṭa Aṣṭabhogadaśasvāmyaṁ kaḷum
nām koḷḷum komuṟaipāṭu Epperpaṭṭatukaḷil pūrvva ttil naṭantuvarukiṟa de vatāyam brahmadā yam niṅkalāka Ācandrārkkamā ka naṭantuvarumpaṭikkuc cilaiyilum cempi
lum veṭṭik kaiyāṇṭu tiṉantoṟum viśvanāthan sandhi pūcaiyum mātantoṟum mṛgaśirṣa t tirunāḷum varuṣantoṟum Āvaṇimulat tirunāḷum tāmraparṇi tirattil
cintupūntuṟaiyil nām pratiṣṭhi ppitta viśvanāthīśva ramuṭaiya nāyaṉār pūcaiyum naṭantuvarumpaṭikku sarvamānya māka nām sahiraṇyodakadhārāpūrva māka kuṭutta taṉmam
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalam bhavet . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānācchreyonupālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnotiThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 5.410 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
